title: Panda's Medieval Amenities
description: For all your medieval building needs!
body:
This mod adds various medieval blocks and items, some of which are:

- Archery Target
- Balustrades (All wood and some stone types)
- Bird Bath
- Charredstone
- Embrasures (Only some stone types)
- Pillars (Only some stone types)
- Stucco
- Sundial
- Tankard
- Thatch
- Wall Panels

This mod pairs well with my other decoration mods, be sure to check them out on my profile!
